articles.author: Anthony  Salvanto, Fred  Backus, Jennifer  De Pinto
articles.title: CBS News poll on Americans' views on Iran prior to conflict - CBS News
articles.description: Americans weighed in on how long a conflict with Iran might last and what Congress should do.
articles.content:
In polling completed just before news of the U.S. airstrikes on Iran, most Americans thought the U.S. should be at least pressuring or engaging the Iranian leadership in some form. 
And in the days … [+3068 chars]

articles.author: Ben Schlappig
articles.title: FAA Orders Flight Cuts At Chicago O’Hare: Impact On American & United Battle? - One Mile at a Time
articles.description: The FAA will be forcing flight cuts at Chicago O'Hare Airport this summer, as American and United keep adding flights there.
